text: Excuse me sir, sir, is this your private jet? No, it's his. This is your jet? Yeah. How did you buy a jet, man? I have one of the largest construction companies in the south. Have you owned the jet or are you ready to get it? I owned the jet. How much was it? How much did you pay for it? About 20 million. 20 million dollars. Could I even use for one minute? I'm actually about to leave. Could we do it on the jet? Just for a minute. It'll be worth it. What was the most amount of money that you made in a single year? 200 million. That's personal. That was personal. The company does about a billion five. Congratulations, man. As a billion-dollar entrepreneur, what is the best financial advice that you would give to the younger generation? If you look at investment advice, a lot of people will say, hey, we're going to have a diversified portfolio. If you look at the wealthiest people in the world, they had a very consolidated portfolio. They went all in on just one or two things and they worked really well. Now, why did you go all in on construction? Because it's not necessarily a sexy business, right? Right. You know what's interesting? I didn't. I went all in on people. And I would say this. I feel like every company in the world is in the people business and the service business. It's just whether they know it or not. What was the lowest point in your career? Man, 2012, unexpectedly, my wife filed for divorce. I had a four-year-old and two-year-old hardest time by far in my entire life. What did you learn about marrying the right woman? I think that's a fantastic question. Matter of fact, one of the most important decisions you'll ever make on this planet is who you marry. Because that person will dictate what your life looks like going forward. How old are you now? 45. If me and you got tomorrow and you had one more message to leave with the younger generation, what would that be? Don't ever put a limit on God's dreams for your life. How did you know God was real? I knew God was real when he showed up when I was in a garage apartment while I was going through a divorce. And I realized in that moment that at the time I didn't even need the wife that I loved. I didn't even need the kids that I loved and couldn't see as much because all I needed was help me showed up. And that was from a rock bottom. And I know to this day, no matter what I go through, he's always going to be there. That's when God became my God. You got amazing advice. I appreciate that. And every week I host live calls with the billionaires at Enemy, where they mentor my audience. Would you do a live call, mentor some people? Love to. Guys, comment billionaire below if you want access to the live call.
